creator: james.wright@digital-chaos.com
text:
Created attachment 177837
Add uk.macbook.kbd and update INDEX.keymaps

Patch to add support for UK MacBook keyboards. Note that some of the symbols (such as the pound and euro) will still only display correctly when you are using a UTF-8 charset.

Keymap was tested on a UK Macbook Air using "kbdmap" to load the new mapping.
